top_signals.title: New Zealand Primary Exports Seen Slower After Stellar 2026 Gain
top_signals.summary: New Zealand’s target of doubling primary exports by 2034 remains in place even as the stellar growth of recent years is tipped to slow in the face of geopolitical and weather challenges.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
